zh.Selside Hall, Westmoreland, England: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德澤爾希德
zh.Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Trafford於大約1357年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾時，她的父親Sir Henry de Trafford Kt35歲，母親Margaret Ince31歲。她於大約1370年與Thomas Booth在英國藍卡爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在英國藍卡爾巴頓。

zh-hans.Selside Hall, Westmoreland, England: 英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德澤爾希德
zh-hans.Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Trafford于大约1357年出生在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Trafford Kt35岁，母亲Margaret Ince31岁。她于大约1370年与Thomas Booth在英国藍卡爾巴頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在英国藍卡爾巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Trafford (Lancashire), Trafford in Chipping Warden (Northamptonshire), and Bridge, Mickle, and Wimbolds Trafford (Cheshire). The Northamptonshire placename probably derives from Old English træppe ‘trap’ + ford ‘ford’. The Cheshire placenames derive from Old English trōg ‘trough’ + ford. The Lancashire placename is a development of Stretford (Lancashire); most cases of the surname probably derive from this place. Early members of the de Trafford family, recorded here from the 13th century, were also recorded in medieval documents as de Stratford(e). Both the surname and the placename lost the initial S-. The manor of Trafford was carved out of Stretford township, and perhaps because its manor house was located at some distance from Stretford village, Trafford was adopted for the new settlement from an early date. See also Stratford .

variants.name: Stratford
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stratford, for example in Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and Wiltshire, from Old English strǣt ‘Roman road’ (see Street ) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name principally from Strafford Sands (now lost) in Mexborough (Yorkshire), presumed to be the ancient meeting-place of Strafforth Wapentake, and deriving from the same source as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Trafford was born about 1357, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Ince, was 31. She married Thomas Booth about 1370, in Barton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Barton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Trafford est née environ 1357, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ince, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Booth environ 1370, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Trafford um 1357 in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Trafford Kt 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ince 31. Sie hat um 1370 in Barton, Lancashire, England Thomas Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Barton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Trafford è nata il circa 1357 nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Ince, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Booth circa 1370, nel Barton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Barton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Traffordが約1357年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Trafford Ktは35歳，母Margaret Inceは31歳であった。約1370年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンでThomas Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Trafford(이)가 대략 1357년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Trafford Kt(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ince(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 Thomas Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Trafford nasceu aproximadamente 1357, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ince, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Booth aproximadamente 1370, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Trafford родилась около 1357 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Trafford Kt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ince, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Booth около 1370 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Trafford nació aproximadamente 1357, en Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Ince, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Booth aproximadamente 1370, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
